description_long: This is a modern, cubic house with three stories, characterized by a flat roof and large, vertically oriented windows on all visible sides. The exterior is finished in a smooth, light-colored material, likely stucco or concrete, giving it a minimalist and contemporary appearance. The front facade features a central entry door flanked by two large windows, with a paved walkway leading up to it and landscaped areas with trees and shrubs on either side. The windows are arranged in a regular, grid-like pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. The house includes outdoor patio spaces, visible on the ground level, with seating and garden elements. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, three-story house with a flat roof, large vertical windows, and minimalist landscaping. The exterior is smooth and light-colored, featuring a central entryway and outdoor patio areas.
description_view_0: Side view showing two large trees, landscaped garden beds, and the house's vertical windows with a glimpse of the entry path.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the symmetrical arrangement of tall windows and the flat, unadorned wall surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with two trees, patio furniture, and a clear view of the house's window grid and flat roof.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the main entry door, flanked by large windows, a paved walkway, and landscaped areas with trees and shrubs.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of large vertical windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central single door with a paved walkway, flanked by large windows and minimal landscaping; no porch or overhang.
